hero.headline: Galgotias University Online MBA in Healthcare Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved, NAAC A+, WES recognised. Total all-in cost Rs 86,400 across 2 years, the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU. Healthcare Management specialisation with Quality Management in Healthcare, Hospital Operations, Medical Terminology, Patient Care Services, and Hospital Hazard and Waste Management in Sem 3-4. No EMI, no scholarships, no bundled perks.

sections.tldr: Galgotias Online MBA Healthcare Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised, Rs 86,400 all-in (second-lowest after IGNOU Rs 66,000). Sem 3-4 covers Quality Management in Healthcare, Hospital Operations, Medical Terminology, Patient Care Services, and Hospital Hazard and Waste Management. No EMI, no scholarships, no perks. Best fit for budget-first healthcare professionals who want a legitimate NAAC A+ MBA at under Rs 1 lakh.

about.body:
Galgotias University, Greater Noida, was established in 2011 and holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. The university is WES recognised for international credential evaluation.

The Online MBA in Healthcare Management covers core MBA subjects in Sem 1-2 and adds healthcare-specific depth in Sem 3-4 with Quality Management in Healthcare, Hospital Operations, Medical Terminology, Patient Care Services, and Hospital Hazard and Waste Management. Strategic Management and Business Communication are included as common Sem 3 subjects.

At Rs 86,400 all-in, this is the cheapest healthcare-focused MBA on EdifyEdu. The trade-off: no EMI, no scholarships, no clinical tie-ups, no hospital internship, and limited brand recognition in the healthcare sector compared to DPU Pune (NAAC A++, NIRF #41) or Symbiosis (strong healthcare vertical). For hospital administrators, clinic managers, or pharma professionals who need an MBA credential at minimal cost, Galgotias Healthcare Management is a budget-first option.

sem3Subjects.name: Quality Management in Healthcare
sem3Subjects.description: Apply quality frameworks (NABH, JCI, ISO) to hospital settings. Covers clinical audit, patient safety indicators, and continuous quality improvement methodologies.

sem3Subjects.name: Hospital Operations
sem3Subjects.description: Manage hospital supply chain, bed management, OT scheduling, outpatient flow, and diagnostic service operations for efficient facility management.

sem3Subjects.name: Medical Terminology
sem3Subjects.description: Build working vocabulary of clinical, diagnostic, and pharmaceutical terms used in hospital administration, insurance claims, and medical records management.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Communication
sem3Subjects.description: Develop written and verbal communication for corporate and clinical settings. Covers report writing, presentation skills, and business correspondence.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse competitive environments using Porter's Five Forces, SWOT, and balanced scorecard frameworks. Build corporate and business-level strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Initial Phase)
sem3Subjects.description: Define research problem, conduct literature review, and finalise methodology for the MBA thesis project.

sem4Subjects.name: Patient Care Services
sem4Subjects.description: Design patient experience workflows, discharge planning, grievance redressal systems, and patient satisfaction measurement frameworks for hospitals and clinics.

sem4Subjects.name: Hospital Hazard and Waste Management
sem4Subjects.description: Implement biomedical waste segregation, CPCB compliance, infection control protocols, and occupational safety standards in healthcare facilities.

sem4Subjects.name: Business Ethics and CSR
sem4Subjects.description: Examine ethical decision-making frameworks, corporate governance codes, CSR reporting standards, and stakeholder management in healthcare contexts.

sem4Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Final Phase)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete data analysis, write findings, and defend the MBA thesis before the evaluation panel.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 core subjects are common across all Galgotias Online MBA specialisations. See the main Galgotias Online MBA page for the core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Healthcare Management MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Multi-speciality and super-speciality hospitals, Diagnostic chains and pathology labs, Pharmaceutical companies, Health insurance and TPA firms, Public health and government healthcare, Healthcare IT and health-tech startups

**Entry-level roles:** Hospital Administrator (Junior), Healthcare Quality Coordinator, Medical Records Manager, Patient Relations Executive, Pharma Sales Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Hospital Operations Manager, Quality Manager (NABH), Healthcare Project Manager, Regional Manager (Pharma), Insurance Claims Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Hospital CEO/COO, Chief Quality Officer, VP Hospital Operations, Head of Patient Services, Director Healthcare Strategy

**Typical hiring organisations:** Apollo Hospitals, Fortis Healthcare, Max Healthcare, Manipal Hospitals, Narayana Health, Medanta, AIIMS, Dr Lal PathLabs, SRL Diagnostics, Cipla, Sun Pharma, Star Health Insurance

Note: Galgotias does not offer hospital internships, clinical tie-ups, or dedicated placement support for online MBA students.

skills.body:
The Galgotias Healthcare Management specialisation builds these skills across Sem 3-4:

**Technical skills:**
- Quality Management in Healthcare: NABH and JCI accreditation framework application, clinical audit methodology, patient safety indicator tracking, and CQI implementation
- Hospital Operations: bed management, OT scheduling optimisation, supply chain management for medical consumables, and outpatient flow design
- Hospital Hazard and Waste Management: biomedical waste segregation per CPCB rules, infection control protocol design, and occupational safety compliance

**Applied skills:**
- Patient Care Services: patient experience workflow design, discharge planning, grievance handling, and satisfaction survey methodology
- Medical Terminology: clinical vocabulary for effective communication with medical staff, insurance companies, and regulatory bodies

**Soft skills:** Business communication for hospital board reporting, strategic management for healthcare facility planning, ethical reasoning for patient rights and clinical governance situations.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Galgotias Online MBA Healthcare Management against peers on EdifyEdu:

**vs IGNOU MBA (Rs 66,000):** IGNOU is Rs 20,400 cheaper but does not offer a dedicated Healthcare Management specialisation. If you need healthcare-specific subjects, Galgotias is the cheapest option with dedicated hospital and patient care coursework.

**vs DPU Pune Online MBA (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU is NAAC A++ with NIRF #41 ranking and strong healthcare brand in Maharashtra. DPU costs over 2x Galgotias. For healthcare careers in Pune, Mumbai, or Western India, DPU brand weight and healthcare alumni network justify the premium.

**vs Amity Online MBA Hospital and Healthcare Management (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is 2.6x the cost with NIRF #22 University ranking and broader healthcare management curriculum. Amity brand is stronger for pan-India hospital chains. Galgotias wins only on cost.

**vs LPU Online MBA Healthcare Management (Rs 1,61,000-2,00,000):** LPU offers zero-cost EMI, Coursera access, and NIRF #31 ranking. LPU has a dedicated healthcare track with stronger career services. Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is roughly half the price but offers no EMI or perks.

**vs Chandigarh University Online MBA (Rs 1,65,000):** CU is NIRF #19 but does not have a dedicated Healthcare Management specialisation in its online MBA. If healthcare focus is essential, Galgotias is cheaper and more specialised.

fees.body:
Galgotias University Online MBA in Healthcare Management has a single fee track with no EMI, no scholarships, and no bundled perks.

**Total all-in cost: Rs 86,400**

- Tuition fee: Rs 76,200 (Rs 33,000/year approx, paid per semester)
- Examination fee: Rs 8,000 (Rs 4,000/year)
- Registration fee: Rs 1,200 (one-time)
- Alumni fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time)

**No EMI facility** from the university. No third-party EMI partner announced.
**No scholarships** or fee waivers available.
**No bundled perks** such as hospital internships, clinical placements, or platform subscriptions.

This is the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU at Rs 66,000, and the cheapest healthcare-focused MBA available.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Galgotias each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Galgotias University, Greater Noida. It carries the MBA designation with Healthcare Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is mentioned per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation. The certificate is valid for hospital administration roles, healthcare management positions, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Galgotias Online MBA Healthcare Management students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Deepak
items.liked: Quality Management in Healthcare and Hospital Operations were directly applicable to my role at a 200-bed hospital. At Rs 86,400, this was the cheapest healthcare MBA I could find.
items.disliked: No hospital internship component. No tie-ups with hospital chains for practical exposure.
items.body: I manage operations at a mid-size hospital in Greater Noida. The MBA credential was required for a promotion to Deputy Director. Galgotias delivered the degree at a price I could afford. The healthcare subjects were relevant, though not as deep as DPU Pune's curriculum.

items.name: Swati
items.liked: Medical Terminology and Patient Care Services filled genuine knowledge gaps. The fee was genuinely affordable on a hospital administrator salary.
items.disliked: Brand recognition in the healthcare sector is limited. Hospital chains in South and West India do not recognise Galgotias the way they recognise DPU or Symbiosis.
items.body: Practical choice for healthcare professionals in UP and Delhi-NCR who need an MBA at minimal cost. For careers at Apollo, Fortis, or Max Healthcare at senior levels, a DPU or Amity MBA would carry more brand weight. Galgotias is best for credential-driven promotions, not brand-driven career switches.

items.name: Mohit
items.liked: Hospital Hazard and Waste Management was a niche subject I have not seen in other online MBA programmes. Directly relevant to compliance roles.
items.disliked: No EMI option was a constraint. Had to pay the semester fee in a lump sum each time.
items.body: For under Rs 90,000, you get a NAAC A+ MBA with dedicated healthcare subjects. That is the core value. Do not expect clinical placements, hospital internships, or recruiter tie-ups. If budget is the deciding factor, Galgotias Healthcare Management is a reasonable choice.

faqs.question: Is Galgotias Online MBA in Healthcare Management suitable for doctors?
faqs.answer: The programme is designed for hospital administrators, clinic managers, and healthcare business professionals. Practising doctors seeking management skills can benefit, but the curriculum focuses on hospital operations and quality management, not clinical practice.

faqs.question: Does Galgotias offer hospital internships for the Healthcare Management MBA?
faqs.answer: No. Galgotias does not offer hospital internships, clinical placements, or tie-ups with hospital chains for the online MBA. Practical healthcare exposure depends on your own professional role.

faqs.question: How does Galgotias Healthcare MBA compare to DPU Pune?
faqs.answer: DPU Pune is NAAC A++, NIRF #41, and costs Rs 1,89,400. DPU has stronger healthcare brand recognition, especially in Western India. Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is less than half the cost but lacks DPU's healthcare alumni network and brand strength.

faqs.question: Is this MBA valid for hospital CEO or COO roles?
faqs.answer: The UGC-DEB approved MBA is a valid qualification for hospital administration roles. However, CEO and COO positions at large hospital chains typically require 10+ years of experience and brand recognition from the MBA institution also plays a role in selection.

faqs.question: Does Galgotias offer EMI for the healthcare management MBA?
faqs.answer: No. Galgotias does not offer any EMI facility or third-party EMI partner. The fee is paid directly to the university per semester.

chooseIf: You need the cheapest healthcare-focused MBA available. At Rs 86,400, Galgotias is the lowest-cost option with dedicated hospital and patient care subjects.
You already work in a hospital or clinic and need an MBA credential for promotion eligibility, not brand prestige.
You need a WES-recognised healthcare MBA for international credential evaluation at minimal cost.
consider: If healthcare brand strength matters, DPU Pune (NAAC A++, NIRF #41, Rs 1,89,400) has the strongest healthcare-sector brand on EdifyEdu.
If you need EMI, LPU Online MBA Healthcare Management at Rs 1,61,600 (with grant) offers 24-month zero-cost EMI.
If pan-India hospital chain recognition matters, Amity Online MBA Hospital and Healthcare Management (NIRF #22, Rs 2,25,000) carries broader brand weight.
